INSERT INTO knowledge_base_articles (title, slug, content, categoryId, createdAt) VALUES
('What is Emtelaak?', 'what-is-emtelaak', 'Egypt leading fractional real estate platform. Invest from $250.', 1, NOW()),
('KYC Verification', 'kyc-verification', 'Required: ID, proof of address, selfie. Review in 1-2 days.', 2, NOW()),
('First Investment', 'first-investment', 'Browse properties, review details, invest, track returns.', 3, NOW()),
('Understanding Returns', 'understanding-returns', 'Quarterly distributions from rental income.', 4, NOW()),
('Get Support', 'get-support', 'Live chat 9AM-6PM, email: support@emtelaak.com', 5, NOW()),
('Property Selection', 'property-selection', 'Consider location, type, financials, and strategy.', 3, NOW()),
('Withdrawing Funds', 'withdrawing-funds', 'Min $50, free for Egypt, 1-2 days processing.', 4, NOW()),
('Account Security', 'account-security', 'Enable 2FA, use strong passwords, avoid phishing.', 5, NOW());
